{{Infobox artifact
| name = Four Corners Rotation Pill
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The Four Corners Rotation Pill is a valuable medicinal item used to facilitate the cycling of [[madra]] and accelerate core advancement. Physically, these pills are smooth and feature swirling colors like blue and white. While they do not provide significant external power compared to other items, they are highly effective at doubling the speed of [[madra]] cycling and expanding a user's core. When used in conjunction with a [[parasite ring]], the pill's benefits are doubled while maintaining a normal cycling sensation. Due to their high cost and effectiveness, they are considered significant training resources. Depending on the user's capacity, it can take multiple days to fully process the energy from a single pill.}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Four Corners Rotation Pill]] is a pill that makes [[madra]] easier to cycle and helps raise a second core to [[Iron]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Four Corners Rotation Pill]] is used for cycling power into the core.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6">''Blackflame'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] had received a dozen Four Corners Rotation Pills.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8">''Blackflame'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|A [[Four Corners Rotation Pill]] might be in [[Lindon]]'s pack.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Arelius family]] provided Four Corners Rotation Pills.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
